case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. WILLIE GRAHAM

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1718 25TH STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107** THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED**, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-15-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $8.56 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, WILLIE
